title: Willow — What Are You Quietly Looking Forward To?
season_arc_note: Ep 5 of 6 — deepening into forward motion. Theme: quiet anticipation. After four episodes of present-tense tending, viewer is invited to look gently forward. Not goal-setting — noticing something they're looking forward to.

provenance_card.label: Synthetic companion · AI generated performer · Willow S1 · Upon Tyne Productions

beats.role: Warm camera address — glad you're here energy
beats.speech_text: Here you are again. I'm glad.
beats.camera: Medium-close, static, warm soft light, slight smile

beats.speech_text: What are you quietly looking forward to — even something small, or far away?
beats.camera: Attentive, open posture, no physical contact staging
beats.sfw_note: Engaged listening pose, no proximity escalation

beats.speech_text: There's something important about keeping a small thing to look forward to. Not a goal. Just a pull. Something that makes next week feel worth getting to.
beats.camera: Slow micro-push on core message, holds on calm delivery
beats.sfw_note: Micro-push only, no framing change, hands remain neutral

beats.camera: Hold — companion holds soft eye contact, lets silence settle

beats.speech_text: That pull — that's enough. You don't need a plan. Just the direction.
One more week. I'll be here for it.
beats.camera: Companion settles naturally, calm close before fade
beats.sfw_note: Clean exit, no lingering intimate frame, low-key CTA
